name: Project Nessie
description: Open-source transactional catalog for data lakes with Git-like semantics, branching, merging and versioning for Apache Iceberg and Delta Lake.

seo.title: Project Nessie — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Project Nessie: Open-source transactional catalog for data lakes with Git-like semantics, branching, merging and versioning for Apache Iceberg and Delta Lake.

when_to_use: Git-like branching and versioning for Apache Iceberg tables
Data CI/CD: branch, test, and merge lakehouse table changes
Transactional catalog enabling zero-copy data lake experiments
Time-travel queries across Iceberg and Delta Lake tables
Reproducible ML experiments with versioned data lake snapshots

pros: Git-like branching for data lake tables
Native Iceberg and Delta Lake support
cons: Concept new to most data engineers
review.verdict: Genuinely novel catalog for lakehouse workflows; adoption still early outside Dremio circles.
review.best_for: Data platform teams wanting Git-style branching for Iceberg or Delta tables
review.not_for: Teams on traditional warehouses without a lakehouse catalog strategy

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
